demographics.living_situation: shares a flat with a roommate, who is present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I feel like I'm burning alive, my whole body is bright red like a sunburn, and I can't even sit up without blacking out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A really high fever, terrible muscle aches and a full-body red rash all came on over the last day, and in the last few hours she's gone dizzy and confused and can't stand — the roommate is terrified and doesn't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 24 hours ago it started with a sudden high fever and awful muscle aches, then the rash came up; the dizziness and confusion are only the last 4 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: around a day and getting rapidly worse
symptom_narrative.character: a fever that feels like burning up, a flat red rash all over that looks like a bad sunburn, terrible aching all over, lots of watery diarrhoea and vomiting, and now feeling faint and muddled
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says it's the worst she's ever felt and she keeps nearly passing out when she tries to sit up
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the rash is everywhere — trunk, arms and legs; the aching is all over her body
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and worsening since it began, with the confusion and near-fainting a new development in the last few hours
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sitting or standing up makes her black out
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: profuse watery diarrhoea, repeated vomiting, and the roommate says her eyes and mouth look very red
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before; she is normally fit and well
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: lying flat in bed, too weak and lightheaded to stand, drifting in and out of making sense

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: She has her period at the moment and has been using high-absorbency tampons. She has not taken any antibiotics recently.

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a household thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: whole body is a flat, bright red flush like a bad sunburn, over the trunk, arms and legs
roommate says her eyes and the inside of her mouth look really red and bloodshot
roommate says she is confused, mumbling, very drowsy and cannot stand up without nearly fainting
signs of a lot of diarrhoea and vomiting in the bathroom
